name: ci-reader
description: Read-only CI status + log streaming across GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, CircleCI, Jenkins, Buildkite, Drone/Woodpecker, Tekton, ArgoCD/WixieCD. Ships ci-registry.json — a declarative capability surface for all 10 systems (auth modes, rate limits, status/conclusion enums, webhook event taxonomy, known quirks) loaded at SessionStart. Normalizes per-system check payloads into a typed Check interface and emits sylph.ci.status.observed events. GitHub Actions fully implemented via gh CLI; 7 other systems stub and degrade to manual-handoff; ArgoCD/WixieCD are GitOps read-only drift detection.
